source: original (Claude-written; sentences reviewed by a native Levantine speaker, 0/5 flagged)

sentences.ar: كل يوم الصبح، بصحى بكير وبعمل قهوة.
sentences.en: Every morning I wake up early and make coffee.
The smell of cardamom fills the house.

sentences.ar: بقعد عالبلكونة وبشرب فنجاني على مهلي.
sentences.en: I sit on the balcony and drink my cup slowly.
This is the most beautiful moment of the day.
